ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., wind energy, wave energy) */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., wave height, OWC pressure) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor deployment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the sensor is deployed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was deployed */,
  "installation_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sensor is installed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the deployment location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the deployment location */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data measurement */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor deployment */,
  "measurement_time" REAL /* Time of the measurement */,
  "wave_height" REAL /* Wave height measurement */,
  "owc_height" REAL /* OWC height measurement */,
  "owc_pressure" REAL /* OWC pressure measurement */,
  "cam_time" REAL /* Camera time measurement */,
  "cam_heave" REAL /* Camera heave measurement */,
  "cam_pitch" REAL /* Camera pitch measurement */,
  "measurement_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_measurements_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES sensor_deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., csv, json) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., txt, pdf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor metadata entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_metadata_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project metadata entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Project leader */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metadata_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor deployment */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time of the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement */,
  "reading_status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES sensor_deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera reading */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor deployment */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time of the reading */,
  "heave_value" REAL /* Heave value of the reading */,
  "pitch_value" REAL /* Pitch value of the reading */,
  "reading_status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_readings_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES sensor_deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the project */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the team member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the parameter */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used for the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
